docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD 12/5/22. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO LANCE WALKER-UNDELIVERABLE/NO AUTHORIZATION TO RECEIVE MAIL AT THIS ADDRESS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WONG, MAIDA AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, LANCE DBA PROPERTY MANAGEMENT 415, INC DBA PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SF DBA SF REALTY GROUP DBA REALTY GROUP SF ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-28-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $75) SERVED OCT-25-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, LANCE DBA PROPERTY MANAGEMENT 415, INC DBA PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SF DBA SF REALTY GROUP DBA REALTY GROUP SF

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-28-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-28-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF MAIDA WONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LANCE WALKER DBA PROPERTY MANAGEMENT 415, INC DBA PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SF DBA SF REALTY GROUP DBA REALTY GROUP SF IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, MAIDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALKER, LANCE DBA PROPERTY MANAGEMENT 415, INC DBA PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SF DBA SF REALTY GROUP DBA REALTY GROUP SF $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,150.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-28-2022 - JUDGMENT.
